notes.heading: Checks for app updates on launch
notes.body: The packaged desktop app now checks GitHub Releases when it starts and downloads newer versions automatically.

notes.heading: Install updates without hunting for files
notes.body: When an app update is downloaded, Dragonwilds Server Control prompts you to restart and install it.

notes.heading: Manual update controls
notes.body: The Deploy page now shows app update status, last check time, download progress, and a Check Now button.

notes.heading: Desktop shortcuts are handled by the installer
notes.body: The recommended setup installer creates Start Menu and desktop shortcuts so the control panel is easy to open after installation.

notes.heading: Administrator launch is automatic
notes.body: The packaged app relaunches through Windows UAC so it can create and manage the default SteamCMD and server folders.

notes.heading: Server data stays on the server
notes.body: Installed-app settings are stored under the Windows app data folder, while game files, saves, logs, and backups remain in the paths you configure.
